steps: Fragmented DNA: variable NEBNext End Repair Reaction Buffer (10X): 10 μl NEBNext End Repair Enzyme Mix: 5 μl Sterile H 2 0 for a final volume of 100 μl: variable Total volume: 100 μl NEBNext End Repair Enzyme Mix New England Biolabs Catalog #E6051 NEBNext End Repair Reaction Buffer: New England Biolabs Catalog #E6052
Incubate in a thermal cycler for 30 minutes at 20°C.
Purify DNA sample on one column.
